title: Yorik-ta
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''yorik-ta''' was the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] version of an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]]. They were made from black [[yorik coral]] and included a [[dovin basal]] for travel and defense. [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane]] maintained a yorik-ta as his personal escape vessel aboard his [[Shimrra's Citadel|Citadel]] [[Koros-Strohna|worldship]].

{{Tech-stub}}
